subject: Mounting of DMAAP listener properties for RANSlice
commit_message:
Mounting of DMAAP listener properties for RANSlice

Mounting of DMAAP listener properties for RANSlice
in SDNC DMAAP-Listener charts

Signed-off-by: SandeepLinux <Sandeep.Shah@ibm.com>

Patch Set 2:

Hi Sylvain - Just an FYI...this is related to DMAAP listener/consumer created in CCSDK/SDNC repo....and we just want to include properties file as a volume mount in POD/HELM charts for SDNC...Thanks!

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> here's the log:
> cat .helm/plugins/deploy/cache/onap/logs/onap-dmaap.log
> Release "onap-dmaap" does not exist. Installing it now.
> NAME:   onap-dmaap
> Error: getting deployed release "onap-dmaap": release: "onap-dmaap" not found
> 
> @Krzysztof, any idea?

I run a local test and it seems that dmaap chart is simply to big to fit in a single config map so helm cannot store it as a release but pods are up
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 2:

my fault, I saw "dmaap" so I took a look at dmaap helm...
but it's on SDN-C
sorry for that
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
